escalation.rationale: Iran struck US troops at Saudi airbase while US-Israeli forces hit Iranian nuclear sites and deployed scatterable mines in Iranian villages.

ticker_items: At least 15 US troops wounded in Iran strike on Saudi airbase
US-Israeli forces hit Iranian nuclear sites as war continues
Houthis ready to join Iran war, threaten Red Sea shipping
Russia launches spring offensive with 400 drones against Ukraine
Israel invades Lebanon amid multi-front war

eastern_europe.description: Russia launched nearly 400 drones plus 23 cruise and 7 ballistic missiles in major spring offensive assault.
Ukrainian drone strike damaged Russian Project 23550 Arctic patrol ship Purga under construction.
Russia launches nearly 400 drones, 23 cruise missiles and 7 ballistic missiles in spring offensive escalation.

middle_east.description: Israel launched new wave of strikes on Iranian weapons production facilities in the heart of Tehran.
Iran launched 83rd wave of missile strikes on Israel with messages thanking India and Germany written on missiles.
Kuwait's main commercial port damaged in drone attack causing material damage but no casualties.
Iran strikes Saudi airbase hosting US forces, wounding at least 15 American troops.
US-Israeli forces strike Iranian nuclear facilities as part of ongoing military campaign.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran death toll
US soldier deaths in Iran war

claimed_totals.figure: 1,937 dead in Iran, 19 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 25 in Gulf states

russia.text: Iran violated none of its international commitments prior to the war, while Ukraine trampled on its promises
russia.speaker: Sergey Lavrov
russia.title: Foreign Minister

ukraine.text: Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: The US is seeking to conclude the war in a matter of weeks
middle_east.speaker: Marco Rubio
middle_east.title: US Secretary of State

middle_east.text: Military is stretched to the limit and beyond
middle_east.speaker: Yair Lapid
middle_east.title: Israeli Opposition Leader

middle_east.text: Hotels accommodating US soldiers across the region are now considered legitimate targets
middle_east.speaker: Iranian Military
middle_east.title: Official Statement

middle_east.text: They will be weaker than they've been in recent history
middle_east.speaker: Marco Rubio
middle_east.title: US Secretary of State

middle_east.text: The military is stretched to the limit and beyond
middle_east.speaker: Yair Lapid
middle_east.title: Israeli Opposition Leader

observers.description: Zelenskyy courting Saudi support as Ukraine seeks Gulf backing amid US focus shifting to Middle East. Iran banned sports teams from traveling to 'hostile' countries including Saudi Arabia.
Kim Jong Un signed new friendship treaty with Belarus President Lukashenko in Pyongyang. Treaty marks shift to 'fundamentally new stage' in bilateral relations according to Minsk.
German defense spending reached 2.4% of GDP in 2025. Iranian missiles displayed messages thanking 'People of Germany' during latest strikes on Israel.

UK commits additional £100 million air defence package for Ukraine to protect cities and critical infrastructure. The funding aims to help defend against Russia's relentless attacks on civilian targets.

Ukrainian forces report Iran is adopting Russian drone tactics, with military delegation stating Iran, North Korea, China and Russia represent one unified war effort. China continues strategic support through technology transfers.

financial.notes: Oil prices drive higher amid fears of longer Iran war, with Brent Crude up more than 50% this month.

update_log.text: Iran strikes Saudi airbase hosting US forces, wounding at least 15 American troops
US-Israeli forces hit Iranian nuclear sites as Secretary Rubio trails end to Iran war
Russia launches nearly 400 drones at Ukraine signaling spring offensive has begun
Houthis signal readiness to join Iran war, threatening Red Sea shipping disruption
Iran threatens nuclear action against US as IRGC claims one million fighters ready for ground invasion
Houthis signal readiness to strike Bab al-Mandab Strait in solidarity with Iran against US-Israel
Israel launches new wave of strikes on Tehran weapons facilities with no diplomatic breakthrough
Pentagon considering diverting Ukraine air defense systems to Middle East due to dwindling stockpiles
